name: Pacgold Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$0.1200. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.1211 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.1200, stop A$0.0990, target A$0.1250. Risk/reward is 0.24:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
